template.name: Sales Demo — Deal Room Bundle
template.description: Personalized 8-scene sales follow-up: cover, recap, challenges, solution, demo highlights, ROI proof, next steps, and booking CTA.

scenes.title: Personal Cover
scenes.description: Personalized follow-up cover with prospect name and rep details.

clips.content: Discovery Follow-Up · Prepared after our conversation
A personalized recap of what we discussed, the challenges you shared, and the recommended path forward. Replace this with your prospect company name and meeting context.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Thanks & Recap
scenes.description: Thank-you message with meeting recap and supporting photo.

clips.content: Thank you for taking the time to walk through your goals, current workflow, and what success looks like for your team. This short video summarizes our conversation so everyone stays aligned.

In the next few slides you will see the challenges we captured in your words, how our platform maps to each one, the parts of the demo that mattered most, and the concrete next steps we agreed to explore.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Your Challenges
scenes.description: Icon + narrative top, dual photo strip bottom — inspired by problem-statement decks.

clips.content: WHAT WE HEARD ON THE CALL

During our call you highlighted friction in your current process — manual handoffs between teams, slow reporting cycles, and limited visibility for stakeholders who need a clear picture of pipeline health. These gaps create delays, rework, and missed opportunities every week.
The photos below reflect the day-to-day reality your team described: operational complexity on one side, and pressure to deliver accurate updates on the other.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Our Solution
scenes.description: Navy solution panel with mapped bullets and product visual.

clips.content: Based on what you shared, we mapped three solution areas that directly address your priorities. Each one connects to a capability we demonstrated live and can be rolled out in phases.
One place to plan, execute, and report — no more spreadsheet sprawl.
Dashboards that update without manual exports or status meetings.
Shareable views for leadership, ops, and customer-facing teams.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Demo Highlights
scenes.description: Three demo moments with screenshot frames and captions.

clips.content: Here are the three parts of the demo that resonated most with your team. Swap the screenshots for your actual product views and tailor each caption to what you walked through on the call.
The unified workspace view we opened first — where your team plans, tracks, and shares updates without switching tools.
The reporting panel that updates automatically so leadership sees progress without waiting for manual exports.
The collaboration view that keeps marketing, sales, and success aligned on every active opportunity.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: ROI & Proof
scenes.description: Impact metrics with customer quote and proof image.

clips.content: Teams in similar situations typically see measurable impact within the first quarter — faster cycle times, fewer status meetings, and clearer ownership across handoffs.
"We finally have one source of truth for customer conversations and follow-up. Our reps send personalized recap videos instead of long email threads."

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Next Steps
scenes.description: Mutual action plan with owners, timelines, and momentum summary.

clips.content: To keep momentum from our conversation, here is a simple mutual action plan. Adjust owners and dates to match what you committed to on the call.
Forward the video to stakeholders who were not on the call so everyone hears the same story.
Schedule a session with our solutions engineer to validate integrations and security requirements.
We will send a scoped proposal with phased rollout options aligned to your fiscal calendar.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Book the Call
scenes.description: Dark closing slide with scheduling CTA and contact details.

clips.content: I am excited to continue the conversation and answer any questions from your broader team. Pick a time that works for you, or reply to this message and we will coordinate the next session.
Reply to this video with questions — I will respond within one business day.
